channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Rights group sues South African government over US arms exports
item.description: Case challenges permits approved by South Africa’s arms control body, citing compliance failures and oversight gaps.

item.title: Archaeologists find ancient matrilineal society in Turkiye’s Catalhoyuk
item.description: About 9,000 years ago, the settlement was an egalitarian, matrilineal society with no evidence of organised violence.

item.title: Fighting in Somalia’s capital as anger over election delay erupts
item.description: Residents flee from their homes due to fighting between two warring political factions.

item.title: First US screwworm case in 60 years: Should America be worried?
item.description: The US Department of Agriculture says New World screwworm has been detected in a Texas calf.

item.title: What do Turkiye and Indonesia want from bilateral talks?
item.description: Turkiye's Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan travelled to Indonesia to cement the two states' growing partnership.

item.title: N Korea’s Kim Jong Un calls for ‘exponential’ expansion of nuclear arsenal
item.description: Kim says expansion necessary due to worsening security threats, long-term confrontations with 'most ferocious enemies'.

item.title: Who are the World Cup Golden Boot favourites? Mbappe, Ronaldo, Messi, Kane?
item.description: There are a host of top players who could claim the coveted title of top goal scorer, including two from the same team.

item.title: Israel’s Smotrich announces plan for 2,162 homes in occupied West Bank
item.description: The far-right finance minister says the new houses will 'strengthen our hold on the land'.

item.title: Man City threatens legal action against Real Madrid following Haaland claim
item.description: Enrique Riquelme held up a Real Madrid shirt bearing Erling Haaland's name, while campaigning for club presidency.

item.title: Quiz: World Cup 2026 – player and team records, key statistics
item.description: Test your football knowledge before the World Cup begins with a 10-question quiz.

item.title: Monsoon rain reaches Kerala 3 days late but on time to save Indian harvests
item.description: The monsoon rains are essential for driving India's $4 trillion economy.

item.title: Who is the Indian guru Venezuelan acting President Delcy Rodriguez follows?
item.description: The Venezuelan leader, who is a devotee of Sathya Sai Baba, is in India as the two countries aim to boost energy ties.

item.title: Itamar Ben-Gvir: The face of Israel’s hard right — or the face of Israel?
item.description: Despite internal criticism, analysts argue Ben-Gvir holds a mirror to much of Israeli society.

item.title: ‘Grossly unfair’: Meta slams Australia’s bid to make platforms pay for news
item.description: Facebook parent company says proposals violate Australia's commitments under its free trade agreement with the US.

item.title: Argentina erupts in protest against gender violence after teen murder
item.description: Argentina erupts in protest against gender violence after teen murder.

item.title: Mehdi Taremi: Iran’s journey to the 2026 World Cup
item.description: Iranian footballer Mehdi Taremi talks to Al Jazeera ahead of one of the most politically charged World Cups in history.

item.title: Ireland’s Black community opens up about racism after ‘George Floyd moment’
item.description: In the wake of Yves Sakila's death following a violent restraint, many say racism in Ireland is an overlooked scourge.

item.title: Israel and Lebanon agree on ceasefire framework in US-led talks
item.description: The US announced an Israel-Lebanon ceasefire framework, but Hezbollah's absence leaves questions over enforcement.

item.title: US House votes to end Trump’s Iran war: Does it matter?
item.description: Four Republicans join Democrats in rare rebuke of president. But Congress still far from able to stop further attacks.

item.title: Did Germany lose its UNSC seat because of support for Israel?
item.description: Germany lost its Security Council bid to Austria and Portugal, which secured the two available seats.

item.title: Nepali Mount Everest guide found alive after being missing for six days
item.description: Dawa Sherpa was last seen around May 29 descending the mountain, but while he did not reach base camp, his client did.

item.title: Who is Khalilur Rahman, Bangladesh FM who beat Cyprus to UNGA presidency?
item.description: Rahman, a career diplomat who held several portfolios at the global body, beats Cyprus’s Ambassador Andreas Kakouris.

item.title: Video: US House of Representatives votes to block further war on Iran
item.description: Republican-led US House of Representatives passed a resolution to halt any further push of the war on Iran.

item.title: World Cup 2026: What are the key dates from the opening match to the final?
item.description: From must-watch games to the grand finale, here's a list of all the important dates on the 2026 World Cup schedule.

item.title: China bans four New Zealand lawmakers over visit to Taiwan
item.description: China says the MPs' visit sends the 'wrong signals' to Taiwan's ruling party.
